title: Investigation: Richmond Park Constituency Labour Party (CLP)
text:
Subject: Richmond Park Constituency Labour Party (CLP)

Investigated for: Failing to deliver its audited statement of accounts for 2022 on time

Decision: One offence found for failing to deliver its audited statement of accounts for 2022 on time. A Variable Monetary Penalty of £1,000 was imposed, which was paid on 26 July.

Summary of reasons: Sanctions were considered appropriate and proportionate in this case in line with our Enforcement Policy.
